nasb.text: If also after these things you do not obey Me, then I will punish you seven times more for your sins.

esv.text: And if in spite of this you will not listen to me, then I will discipline you again sevenfold for your sins,

cnv.text: 經過這些以後，如果你們還不聽從我，我就要因你們的罪加重七倍管教你們。

ccb.text: “如果你们受过这些惩罚，仍然不知悔改，我要把比先前严厉七倍的惩罚加在你们身上。
